name: CodeBoard
description: A collaborative code editor with real-time multi-cursor support, syntax highlighting for 20+ languages, and integrated terminal. Built for pair programming sessions during hackathons.

name: PlacePrep CLI
description: A command-line tool that fetches daily coding problems from LeetCode and Codeforces, tracks progress, and generates performance analytics for placement preparation.

name: SentimentScope
description: A real-time sentiment analysis dashboard for Twitter/X data. Uses fine-tuned BERT models to classify public opinion on trending topics with 92% accuracy.

name: NetGuard
description: An open-source network monitoring tool that detects suspicious traffic patterns, port scans, and potential intrusion attempts using rule-based and ML-based detection.

name: EventFlow
description: An event management platform built for college technical festivals. Features registration, QR check-in, real-time attendance tracking, and automated certificate generation.

name: GitStats
description: A GitHub contribution visualizer that generates beautiful SVG cards showcasing a developer's open-source journey, commit patterns, and language diversity.

name: SmartNotes
description: An AI-powered note-taking app that auto-generates summaries, flashcards, and mind maps from lecture transcripts and handwritten notes using GPT-4 and OCR.

name: DSA Visualizer
description: An interactive web app that visualizes sorting algorithms, graph traversals, tree operations, and dynamic programming solutions step-by-step with adjustable speed.
